nodes.docstring_summary: Etsy Pipeline — Production-grade Etsy asset generation pipeline.
Config package — application configuration and settings.
Application settings — loaded from environment variables and .env file.
Central configuration for the Etsy pipeline.
Return the resolved project root path.
Get the singleton Settings instance.
Models package — shared data models for the pipeline.
Job model — the shared state object passed between all pipeline stages.
Central state object passed between all pipeline stages.
List of sections that have at least one prompt.
Record an error message.
Append a timestamped log entry.
Get the output directory for this job.
Generate a human-readable summary of the job state.
Total number of prompts across all sections.
Status of a pipeline job.
Result of a single pipeline stage execution.
Calculate duration in seconds, if both timestamps exist.
Mark this stage as completed.
Mark this stage as failed with an error message.
Mark this stage as running.
Status of an individual pipeline stage within a job.
Pipeline package — orchestration layer for pipeline execution.
Pipeline orchestrator — sequences pipeline stages with zero business logic.
Orchestrates the Etsy asset generation pipeline.
Initialize the Pipeline with all worker instances.
Execute the full pipeline on a Job.
Run a single stage by name.
Services package — external service abstractions (Gemini, GCS, etc.).
Utils package — shared utilities, logging, and exceptions.
Custom exceptions for the Etsy pipeline.
Raised when background removal via rembg fails.
Raised when CSV generation fails.
Raised when required configuration is missing or invalid.
Raised when Etsy listing upload fails.
Raised when image generation via ComfyUI fails.
Raised when Etsy metadata generation fails.
Raised when mockup generation fails.
Base exception for all pipeline errors.
Raised when prompt generation fails.
Raised when the raw Gemini response cannot be parsed into sections.
Raised when parsed prompts fail validation (missing sections, too few prompts, etc.).
Raised when the SKILL.md file cannot be loaded or parsed.
Raised when image upscaling fails.
Structured logging setup for the Etsy pipeline.
Colored console formatter for development.
Structured JSON formatter for production.
Get a logger for a specific module.
Configure root logging for the pipeline.
Workers package — independent processing modules for each pipeline stage.
PromptWorker — generates image generation prompts using Gemini 2.5 Flash.
Generates image generation prompts for Etsy clipart bundles.
Initialize the PromptWorker.
Build the user message for Gemini from the Job's theme parameters.
Call Gemini 2.5 Flash with the SKILL.md system instruction.
Extract individual prompts from a section's content.
Extract the character roster from the preamble text.
Get or create the Gemini client.
Load and cache the SKILL.md content, stripping YAML frontmatter.
Parse the raw Gemini response into section-organized prompts.
Remove YAML frontmatter from markdown content.
Validate parsed prompts against SKILL.md rules.
Generate prompts for the given job.
Module-level entry point for prompt generation.
Prompt worker configuration — constants and settings specific to prompt generation.
AST-based static code graph generator for the etsy_pipeline codebase.
Builds a JSON code graph by walking Python source files via the AST.
Initialize an empty graph builder.
Extract a class node and all its method nodes.
Parse a single Python file and extract its graph contributions.
Extract a function/method node and its outbound call edges.
Walk all configured scan roots and build the graph.
Serialize the graph to a JSON-compatible dictionary.
Extract called names from a function body (best-effort, static only).
Return the first line of a node's docstring, or empty string.
Compute a stable hash of graph content, excluding the timestamp.
Return True if a name is considered part of the public interface.
Convert a file path to a dotted module identifier.
CLI entry point for the graph generator.
CLI entry point for running the prompt generation stage.
Main entry point.
Parse command-line arguments.
Save the raw prompt text and parsed prompts to files.
Tests package.
Unit and integration tests for the PromptWorker.
Test user message construction.
Verify basic message includes theme and event.
Verify prompt count is included when provided.
Verify style hint is included when provided.
Test the _parse_response method.
Verify active sections contain at least 10 prompts.
Verify empty response raises PromptParsingError.
Verify non-structured response raises PromptParsingError.
Verify inactive sections have empty prompt lists.
Verify all locked sections are present in parsed output.
Verify prompts are clean single-line strings without numbering.
Verify character roster is extracted from preamble.
Integration tests that call the actual Gemini API.
Test full prompt generation with Gemini API.
Test YAML frontmatter removal.
Verify content without frontmatter is returned unchanged.
Verify frontmatter is removed from content.
Test the _validate_prompts method.
Verify all-empty prompts raises PromptValidationError.
Verify missing sections are added as empty lists.
Verify valid prompts pass validation.
Sample Gemini response mimicking SKILL.md output format.
Create a sample Job for testing.
Create a PromptWorker instance for testing.
